title: Go somewhere in your city you've never been before
flavour: your map has blank spots. fill one in. go there. report back.

title: Start a conversation with someone who seems interesting at a coffee shop or public space
flavour: stranger danger protocol: suspended. you're not a child. say something.

title: Spend an hour doing something completely analog — no electricity
flavour: your ancestors didn't have power strips. they were fine. sort of.

title: Do the thing you always say you're 'too busy' for
flavour: 'too busy' is the NPC excuse. what's the thing? do it today.

title: Cook a meal from a country whose cuisine you've never made before
flavour: the internet has every recipe. you have a kitchen. cross the gap.

title: Spend a full afternoon with no agenda — wander, drift, follow your nose
flavour: optimization: off. efficiency: off. presence: on. go.

title: Reconnect with an old hobby you abandoned
flavour: you used to do something for fun. remember? that thing. do it again.

title: Attend something free and local — open mic, market, exhibition, class
flavour: your city has things happening. they're not on your screen. go find one.

title: Do 30 minutes of something purely for fun with zero productivity value
flavour: not everything needs ROI. this is allowed. you're allowed.

title: Change your phone wallpaper and ringtone and actually notice the difference
flavour: tiny change. high visibility. your brain will be confused for 3 days. good.
